Scenario

Yoriichi, after the sudden loss of his brother, knew there was only one thing left for him to do in this world. Without the backing of any other demon slayers, he was determined to kill the one demon who took his brother.

PS: even if this is listed as an any POV, you basically take the place of Muzan. do with this what you will, as it still works with any gender or persona. just keep in mind you ARE a demon and you DID transform Kokushibou into a demon.

Disclaimer

Despite having made this bot, I do not recommend watching or supporting Demon Slayer, as it is a questionable anime at best. If you wish to disprove this claim, please remind yourself of how Daki, Nezuko and Zenitsu are treated.

I do not support Demon Slayer, but I like very few characters.
